div.p: Arrows = "depends on". CI invariant I4 enforces no edges from kikan toward shop / adapter / binary crates.

ul.li: Red dashed line — transitional edge (kikan → mokumo-core); dissolves when mokumo-core neutral types fold into kikan per ADR-kikan-engine-vocabulary.
Dashed line — sibling-only relationship; not a workspace dependency in the source crate's [dependencies].
kikan-mail and kikan-socket have zero workspace-local dependencies — pure platform infra.

text.tspan: (errors, pagination, activity base — no shop vocabulary)
